items.title: US attack on Iran paused, nuclear deal possible - Trump
items.desc: US President Donald Trump said he had paused a planned attack against Iran ⁠after Tehran sent a peace proposal to Washington and that there was now a "very good chance" of reaching a deal limiting Iran's nuclear programme.

items.title: Peace proposal includes reparations for war damage - Iran
items.desc: Tehran's latest peace proposal to the United States involves ending hostilities on all fronts, including Lebanon, the exit of US forces from areas close to Iran, and reparations for destruction ⁠caused by the US-Israeli war, state media reported.
